name: BRUNSWICK CORP
business: Brunswick Corporation designs, manufactures, and markets recreational marine products including marine propulsion systems and boats, as well as parts and accessories for marine and RV markets. It also operates the world's largest boat club, Freedom Boat Club. The company sells to boat builders, marine dealers, distributors, retailers, and governmental agencies.

exposures.sentence: Mercury Marine also manufactures two-stroke, non-DFI (direct fuel injection) engines for certain markets outside the United States and Avator electric propulsion systems in models ranging from 7.5e to 110e.
The Propulsion segment also includes Fliteboard premium electric eFoil systems.

Navico Group's Simrad brand announced the launch of the Simrad AutoCaptain Autonomous Boating System, a revolutionary advancement in marine technology featuring full auto-docking capabilities, including docking, undocking, and short distance maneuvering.

Simrad also unveiled the groundbreaking AutoTrack feature for the HALO 2000 and HALO 3000 radar systems, with the ability to automatically detect, track, and prioritize moving vessels and other targets, significantly enhancing situational awareness and on-water safety.

We are continuously and consistently innovating the future of recreational boating through frequent releases of new products, features, and functions; delivering intuitive and seamless solutions; advancing artificial intelligence-enabled approaches; and growing service, connectivity, autonomy, and alternative participation capabilities and businesses.
Navico Group creates connected ecosystems encompassing marine electronics, electrification and power components, and digital switching components.
We have been the target of attempted cyber attacks and other security threats and we may be subject to future breaches of our IT and OT systems.
Freedom Boat Club (FBC) is the world's largest boat club network.

catalysts.event: 2026 capital strategy: planned debt reductions of $160M, capex of $200M, and $50M share repurchases
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate executing a thoughtful capital strategy in 2026 with planned debt reductions of approximately $160 million, capital expenditures of approximately $200 million, and $50 million of share repurchases, which could increase in the event cash generation outpaces initial expectations.
